articles.title: What’s Behind the 50% LUNC Price Increase?
articles.description: To conclude, the most likely LUNC price forecast suggests that an upward movement toward $0.000260 will occur. Before that, a short-term rejection could transpire. A close above the $0.000186 resistance area would confirm this possibility while a drop below $0.000121 would invalidate it.

articles.title: Cardano Remains King Of Dev Activity, Will Price Follow In 2023?
articles.description: Data shows Cardano is still at the top of the developer activity list, despite the crypto’s price not having the best of times recently.
